title: Citrus Refresher Smoothie
description: A quick and refreshing smoothie perfect for a hot summer day, made with citrus fruits and a hint of milk.

ingredients.name: Citrus
ingredients.notes: A combination of orange and lemon juice

instructions: Add milk, citrus, and refresh to a blender.
Taste and adjust sweetness or citrus level as needed.
Pour into a glass and serve immediately.
Garnish with a slice of citrus, if desired.
